Supplemental Narrative PTLM MIKE LIBELL (714)
SUPPLEMENTAL 09/15/2019 20:56 - 714 PTLM MIKE LIBELL. On September 15, 2019 at approximately 1830hrs. I returned a phone call to Robert Mallick of Garland Street. Mallick stated that his friend Nick Flatz was a co-worker of the deceased John Evans. Flatz had indicated that Evans had mentioned on several occasions that he might blow up their place of employment. Both Flatz and Evans worked in the "Life Pittsburgh" warehouse located in Mckees Rocks. Flatz became concerned after Evans destroyed his Garland Street Home. I spoke briefly with Flatz then contacted Allegheny County Detectives who were handling the Garland Street incident. I Spoke with Sgt. Costa and passed along the all of the pertinent information.
-
